stem_zh:
要求解析 (25 分)
评估 Southmed 的财务表现和业务状况。
你应该在你的讨论中指出所提供的数据中的任何遗漏，进一步的信息将有助于扩展你
的分析。
提供比率和趋势的相关计算，以支持您的评估。
注：10 分可用于计算。
(20 分)
专业评分将授予在你的回答中表现出的分析和评估技巧、置疑精神和商业洞察力。
(5 分)
Note: Credit will be given for alternative, relevant, calculations and discussion.
Candidates will not be expected to complete all the calculations shown to obtain
10 marks.
Revenue and profitability
Overall, there has been a small decrease in Southmed Co (Southmed)’s revenue over
the last two years with a rather larger decrease in gross profit.
Revenue and gross profit have declined particularly in the restaurants in the biggest
cities. Possibly, fewer people are dining out in city centres, but also the better dining
experience offered by more expensive competitor restaurants may be appealing more
to customers. The gross profit margin of these restaurants has also dropped from 18·2%
to 15·5%. This may suggest a cost base which cannot easily be cut in line with falls in
revenue.
总体而言，在过去两年中， Southmed 的收入略有下降，但毛利下降幅度较大。
收入和毛利下降尤其是在最大城市的餐馆。在市中心外出就餐的人可能会减少，但价
格更高的竞争对手餐厅提供的更好的就餐体验也可能对顾客更具吸引力。这些餐厅的
毛利率也从 18.2%下降到 15.5%。这可能意味着成本基础不容易随着收入的下降而削
减。
The restaurants in the tourist areas have shown an increase in revenue, but their gross
profits have declined slightly. This may be due to poor cost control, or it may be that
restaurant managers have been charging lower prices to compete with the cheaper
restaurants. This will have resulted in an increase in activity but lower gross profits if
food and other costs have not fallen.
旅游区的餐馆收入有所增加，但毛利略有下降。这可能是由于成本控制不力，也可能
是因为餐厅经理一直在收取较低的价格来与较便宜的餐厅竞争。如果食品和其他成本
没有下降，这将导致活动增加，但毛利下降。
The restaurants in the small cities and towns show stable figures. This may be an
indication that costs are being controlled satisfactorily, possibly because, for example,
waste is being carefully controlled.
小城镇的餐馆显示出稳定的数字。这可能表明成本得到了令人满意的控制，这可能是
因为，例如，浪费得到了仔细的控制。
The fall in the sector’s average gross profit margin over the last three years is similar to
the fall Southmed has experienced, suggesting that the sector generally is having
similar issues to Southmed. Although the sector’s average % margins are higher than for
Southmed, these may be of limited use as comparators, as these margins will be
influenced by figures from chains which Southmed would not regard as competitors.
Figures for Southmed’s individual competitors would be better comparators, ideally
broken down geographically in the same way in which Southmed’s figures are.
过去三年该行业平均毛利率的下降与 Southmed 经历的下降类似，表明该行业普遍存
在与 Southmed 类似的问题。尽管该行业的平均利润率高于 Southmed，但作为比较对
象，这些利润率的用途可能有限，因为这些利润率会受到 Southmed 不视为竞争对手
的连锁店的数据的影响。Southmed 的单个竞争对手的数据将是更好的比较对象，理想
的情况是按照 Southmed 的数据一样的方式进行地理细分。
The revenue per restaurant’s figures are of limited use for comparison between the
different restaurant segments, as they do not reflect the ability of the restaurants to
generate revenue. Comparisons of revenue and profit per meals served or space
occupied would give a better indication, whilst using revenue per employee would be a
measure of efficiency. Also, each segment is an aggregation of the performance of a
number of restaurants. It would be helpful to see the variation in performance in each
segment.
每家餐厅的收入数字在不同餐厅细分市场之间的比较中用处有限，因为它们不能反映
餐厅产生收入的能力。比较提供的每顿饭或占用的空间的收入和利润会给出一个更好
的指示，而使用每个雇员的收入将是一个效率的措施。此外，每个细分市场都是许多
餐馆业绩的汇总。这将有助于了解每个部分的性能差异。
The decrease in gross profitability has been enhanced by the rise in administration costs
which has resulted in a fall in operating profit margin from 8·0% to 6·4%. More details are
needed about why administration costs are rising when business at the restaurants is
not increasing. Although average operating profit margin for the sector has also been
falling, this appears to be mainly due to the fall in gross profit margin, with the larger
fall in Southmed’s operating profit margin suggesting it has greater issues with
operating cost control.
管理费用的增加加剧了总盈利能力的下降，导致营业利润率从 8 0%下降到 6 4%。需要
更多的细节来解释为什么在餐馆的生意没有增加的情况下，管理成本却在上升。尽管
该行业的平均营业利润率也在下降，但这似乎主要是由于毛利率的下降。Southmed 的
营业利润率下降幅度更大，表明其在运营成本控制方面存在更大问题。
The lower return on capital employed is due to the fall in profitability, as the asset base
has decreased slightly over the three years. The number of restaurants has been static
over the last three years, possibly due to lack of funds for investment in new sites. In
addition, the decline in the value of non-current assets appears to indicate that
additional investment is not being made in the asset base, when, by contrast,
competitor restaurants are investing in better surroundings.
资本回报率较低是由于盈利能力下降，因为资产基础在过去三年中略有下降。在过去
的三年里，餐馆的数量一直保持不变，这可能是因为缺乏投资新场所的资金。此外，
非流动资产价值的下降似乎表明没有对资产基础进行额外投资，相比之下，竞争对手
的餐厅正在对更好的环境进行投资。
Solvency
Using market values to estimate the value of equity, gearing has remained fairly static
over the three years with the fall in non-current liabilities being matched by the fall in
the value of equity due to the decrease in the share price. This raises the question of
why additional loan funding has not been sought, particularly as Southmed’s gearing is
lower than the sector average. The level of interest cover may be a factor. The fall in
profitability has resulted in decreased interest cover in 20X2, despite the lower financing
cost. Further falls in profitability or taking out of more loan finance may result in interest
cover falling to unacceptably low levels.
使用市场价值来估计权益价值，三年来杠杆率保持相当稳定，非流动负债的下降与股
价下跌导致的权益价值下降相匹配。这提出了一个问题，即为什么没有寻求额外的贷
款融资，尤其是在 Southmed 公司的杠杆率低于行业平均水平的情况下。兴趣覆盖的
程度可能是一个因素。尽管融资成本降低，但盈利能力的下降导致 20X2 的利息覆盖率
下降。盈利能力进一步下降或获得更多贷款融资可能会导致利息覆盖降至不可接受的
低水平。
Liquidity
The company’s current ratio has shown a drop in 20X2, predominantly due to the
increase in trade payables, reflected in an increase in the payables payment period. This
may be a one-off caused by a year-end distortion in paying suppliers, but it may be an
early sign of possible cash flow pressures. The main current asset is the bank and cash
balance which Southmed has been able to maintain, it does not appear to require
overdraft financing at present. The fact that it has not changed very much over the
three years may indicate that it is a precautionary balance.
该公司的流动比率在 20X2 有所下降，主要是由于贸易应付款增加，反映在应付款支付
期延长。这可能是年终向供应商付款扭曲导致的一次性事件，但它可能是可能的现金
流压力的早期迹象。主要流动资产是 Southmed 公司能够维持的银行和现金余额，目
前似乎不需要透支融资。三年来变化不大的事实可能表明这是一种预防性的平衡。
Investor
Southmed has been able to maintain the level of dividend payment, which could
arguably be a sign of the directors showing confidence in the company’s ability to
generate cash flows. However, it does not appear to be convincing as the company’s
share price has fallen by 6% and 9% over the last two years. Investors may be taking the
view that the decline in dividend cover from 1·7 to 1·4 is a sign that dividends are not
sustainable. Any fall in dividends would lead to a further fall in total shareholder return,
which has declined over the last two years despite the increase in dividends. Part of the
reason for the fall may be the restaurant sector not generally being popular with
investors, as shown by the sector’s average fall in share price. However, Southmed’s
share price has declined at a faster rate, indicating shareholders have specific concerns
about it.
The increase in the price/earnings ratio reflects the fact that share price has not fallen at
the same rate as earnings.
Southmed 一直能够保持股息支付水平，这可能表明董事们对公司产生现金流的能力充
满信心。然而，这似乎并不令人信服，因为该公司的股价在过去两年里分别下跌了6%
和 9%。投资者可能认为股息覆盖率从 17%下降到 14%表明股息不可持续。股息的任何
下降都将导致股东总回报的进一步下降。尽管股息有所增加，但股东总回报在过去两
年中一直在下降。股价下跌的部分原因可能是餐饮业普遍不受投资者欢迎，该行业股
价的平均跌幅就表明了这一点。然而，Southmed 的股价以更快的速度下跌，表明股东
对其有具体的担忧。
市盈率的上升反映了一个事实，即股价的下跌速度与收益的下跌速度不同。
Conclusion
At present, Southmed is managing to meet its loan repayments and maintain the level
of dividend, but this situation may not continue if profits continue to fall. In addition, the
need to invest in the non-current asset base of the company means that extra finance
has to be generated. It seems doubtful whether its current operations will be able to
generate the funds required. Southmed has only been able to generate increased
revenue in the tourist centre segment, but the gross profits of the tourist centre
restaurants have fallen. Increased debt might send gearing up to levels which would
concern shareholders and the stock market, particularly as interest commitments might
threaten dividend payments. The fall in share price, despite the maintenance of
dividend levels, suggests Southmed may struggle to raise sufficient funds through an
equity issue.
目前，Southmed 正在设法偿还贷款并维持股息水平，但如果利润继续下降，这种情况
可能不会持续下去。此外，需要投资于公司的非流动资产基础意味着必须产生额外的
资金。它目前的业务是否能够筹集到所需的资金似乎令人怀疑。Southmed 只能在游客
中心部分增加收入，但游客中心餐厅的毛利已经下降。债务增加可能会使杠杆比率上
升到令股东和股市担忧的水平，尤其是在利息承诺可能威胁到股息支付的情况下。尽
管股息水平得以维持，但股价的下跌表明，Southmed 可能难以通过发行股票筹集到足
够的资金。
Appendix
Professional skills marks
Analysis and evaluation
– Appropriate use of the data to determine suitable calculations
– Appropriate use of the data to support discussion, draw appropriate conclusions
and design appropriate responses
– Identification of omissions from the analysis, or further analysis, which could be
carried out to enable an appropriate decision/recommendation to be made
– Demonstration of reasoned judgement when considering key organisational
matters and impacts
Scepticism
– Effective challenge of information, evidence and assumptions supplied and
techniques carried out to support key facts and/or decisions
– Demonstration of the ability to probe into the reasons for issues and problems,
including the identification of missing information or additional information
Commercial acumen
– Effective use of examples and/or calculations from the scenario information and
other practical considerations related to the context to illustrate points being
made
– Recognition of external constraints and opportunities as necessary
Maximum 5 marks
题干解析
The following exhibits, available on the left-hand side of the screen, provide information
relevant to the question:
1. Abertafol Co’s interest rate hedging
2. Directors’ queries about hedging
This information should be used to answer the question requirements within your
chosen response option(s).
屏幕左侧的下列图表提供了与该问题相关的信息:
1. Abertafol 公司的利率对冲
2. 董事对套期保值的疑问
此信息应用于回答您选择的回答选项中的问题要求。
1. Abertafol Co’s interest rate hedging
Abertafol Co is planning a change in its arrangements for distributing its products. The
company wishes to dispose of its large distribution centre in the middle of its home
country and invest the proceeds of sale in two smaller distribution centres, one in the
north and the other in the south of the country.
It is currently 1 February 20X8. Because of expected timing differences in the three
transactions, Abertafol Co expects to take out a short-term loan of $24m from 1 May
20X8 to 1 September 20X8.  It then expects to make a short-term investment of $18m
from 1 September 20X8 to 1 February 20X9.
Abertafol Co intends to hedge interest rate risk using derivatives. The terms offered on
derivatives are based on the central bank base rate. It can be assumed that futures or
options contracts are settled at the end of each month. Basis can be assumed to
diminish to zero at contract maturity at a constant rate, based on monthly time
intervals. It can also be assumed that there is no basis risk and there are no margin
requirements.
1. Abertafol 公司的利率对冲
Abertafol 公司正计划改变其产品分销安排。该公司希望处置其位于本国中部的大型配
送中心，并将销售收入投资于两个较小的配送中心，一个位于该国北部，另一个位于
该国南部。
现在是 20X8 年 2 月 1 日。由于这三笔交易的预期时间差异，Abertafol 公司预计从
20X8 年 5 月 1 日申请一笔为期 4 个月，金额是 2400 万美元的短期借款，借款期限从
20X8 年 5 月 1 日到 20X8 年 9 月 1 日获得 2400 万美元的短期贷款。然后，它预计从
20X8 年 9 月 1 日进行为期 5 个月的短期投资，金额是 1800 万美元，投资期限从 20X8
年 9 月 1 日到 20X9 年 2 月 1 日。
Abertafol 公司打算利用衍生品对冲利率风险。衍生品的条款是基于中央银行的基本利
率。可以假设期货或期权合约在每个月底结算。可以假定基差在合约到期时以固定的
速率递减至零，基于每月的时间间隔。也可以假设没有基差风险，没有保证金要求。
$24m loan
Abertafol Co can borrow at central bank base rate plus 40 basis points. At present, the
central bank base rate is 5·1%. Commentators expect the government to raise the
central bank base rate by up to 0·8% to 5·9% before 1 May 20X8.
Abertafol Co’s finance department intends to use forward rate agreements or futures to
hedge the loan. It has already found out that using a forward rate agreement for the
loan would result in a net payment of $461,600, which is an effective annual interest
rate of 5·77%.
2400 万美元贷款
Abertafol 公司可以以央行基准利率加 40 个基点的利率进行借款。目前，中央银行的
基本利率是 5.1%。评论员预计政府将在 2008 年 5 月 1 日前将中央银行基本利率上调
0.8%至 5.9%。
Abertafol 公司的财务部门打算利用远期利率协议或利率期货来对冲贷款。它已经发
现，使用远期利率协议的贷款将导致净支付 461,600 美元，有效年利率是 5.77%。
Three-month $ futures, $500,000 contract size
Prices are quoted in basis points at 100 – annual % yield
Month Price
June 94.55
September 94.50
$18m investment
Abertafol Co can invest at central bank base rate minus 30 basis points.
An election is due on 1 July 20X8. The main opposition party has promised that it will
reduce the central bank base rate from whatever the level was before the election.
Commentators expect that the central bank base rate could be a minimum of 4·5% if the
main opposition party wins the election. At present, the election result cannot be
predicted with confidence. It can be assumed that interest rates will not be reduced if
the current government wins the election.
Abertafol Co’s finance department has already found out that using a forward rate
agreement for the investment would guarantee $378,750, which is an effective annual
interest rate of 5·05%.
Because of the uncertainty surrounding the election result, the finance department is
looking at buying call options as the alternative to using a forward rate agreement to
hedge the investment.
1800 万美元的投资
Abertafol 公司可以以央行基本利率减去 30 个基点的利息进行投资。
选举定于 2008 年 7 月 1 日举行。主要反对党承诺，将从选举前的水平下调央行基准利
率。评论员预计，如果主要反对党赢得选举，中央银行的基本利率可能至少为4.5%。
目前，选举结果无法有把握地预测。可以假定，如果现任政府赢得选举，利率不会降
低。
Abertafol 公司的财务部门已经发现，使用远期利率协议进行投资将保证 378,750 美
元，有效年利率是 5.05%。
由于选举结果的不确定性，财政部正在考虑购买看涨期权，作为使用远期利率协议对
冲投资的替代方案。
Options on three-month September $ futures, $500,000 contract size, option
premiums are in annual %
Calls Exercise price
0.298 94.75
2. Directors’ queries about hedging
At the last board meeting, Abertafol Co’s finance director explained to the board the
possible strategies for hedging the loan and the investment. She has received a number
of queries from directors about the plans:
– Director A stated that Abertafol Co should not be using derivatives, as trading in
derivatives was not part of the company’s normal activities. Therefore, shareholders
would not expect the company to be using derivatives.
– Director B understood that futures or a forward rate agreement might be the best
solution if the central bank rate rose up to 5·9% or fell down to 4·5%. However, she
queried what would happen if rates did not rise as high as 5·9%, nor fall as low as 4·5%.
Abertafol Co could possibly lose the chance of benefiting from more favourable rates
than those offered by the futures or forward rate agreement.
– Director C stated that options should not be used to hedge the $18m investment, as
they would never be the best choice because of their premium. The best choice would
be not to hedge at all.
2. 董事对套期保值的疑问
在上次董事会上，Abertafol 公司的财务总监向董事会解释了对冲贷款和投资的可能策
略。她收到了许多董事们对这些计划的询问:
– 董事 A 表示 Abertafol 公司不应使用衍生品，因为衍生品交易不是公司正常活
动的一部分。因此，股东不会期望公司使用衍生品。
– 董事 B 明白，如果中央银行利率上升至 5.9%或下降至 4.5%，期货或远期利率协
议可能是最佳解决方案。不过，她质疑如果利率不升至 5.9%或降至 4.5%会怎
样。Abertafol 公司可能会失去从比期货或远期利率协议更优惠的利率中获益的
机会。
– 董事 C 表示，期权不应用于对冲 1800 万美元的投资，因为期权因其溢价而永
远不会是最佳选择。最好的选择是根本不对冲。
Requirements (25 marks)
(a) Advise on hedging strategies, based on the hedging choices that the finance
department is considering for:
•  the loan of $24m, assuming the central bank base rate rises to 5.9%;
•  the investment of $18m, assuming the central bank base rate falls to 4.5%.
Support your answer with appropriate calculations and discussion.
(13 marks)
Note: Up to 4 marks are available for discussion.
(b) Discuss the queries raised by each of the directors.
(7 marks)
Professional marks will be awarded for the demonstration of skill in analysis and
evaluation, scepticism and commercial acumen in your answer.
(5 marks)

stem_zh:
要求解析 (25 分)
(a)根据财务部正在考虑的套期保值选择，对套期保值策略提出建议:
 2400 万美元的贷款，假设央行基本利率升至 5.9%；
 假设央行基本利率降至 4.5%，投资 1800 万美元。
用适当的计算和讨论来支持你的答案。
(13 分)
注意：最多 4 分可供讨论。
(b)讨论每位董事提出的疑问。
(7 分)
专业评分将授予在你的回答中表现出的分析和评估技巧、质疑精神和商业洞察力。
(5 分)
(a) $24m loan
Forward rate agreement (FRA)
Net payment is $461,600 and effective annual interest rate is 5·77%, as stated in Exhibit
1.
Futures
Sell June futures, as the hedge is against a rise in interest rates and the borrowing
occurs in May.
Number of contracts = $24m/$500,000 x 4 months/3 months = 64 contracts
Basis
Current price (1 February) – futures price = basis
(100 – 5·10) – 94·55 = 0·35
Unexpired basis on 1 May = 2/5 x 0·35 = 0·14
Central bank base rate increases to 5·9%
$
Underlying borrowing cost 6·3% x $24m x 4/12                                                (504,000)
Expected futures price100 – 5·9 – 0·14 = 93·96
Gain on the futures market(0·9455 – 0·9396) x $500,000 x 3/12 x 64                  47,200
Net borrowing cost                                                                                         (456,800)
Effective annual interest rate$456,800/$24m x 12/4                                              5·71%
答案
explanation_zh:
对于未来 20X8 年 5 月 1 日开始的为期 4 个月的借款，需要申请的是 5 月 1 日之后到
期的期货合约，也就是 6 月 30 日到期的 June contract。
由于是对冲短期借款，所以在期货市场上是先卖后买（go short） ，所以现在通过sell
June Future 来构建对冲。
合约数量需要同时考虑金额和期限上的 coverage，毕竟期货市场上的期货合约期限都
只有 3 个月。
由于我们需要的是 20X8 年 5 月 1 日当天的 future price，所以根据基差按照线性的方
式逐步递减到零。
总的基差是 spot 与 June future 94.55 之间的差额， 鉴于 future 特殊的报价形式，需要
用 100-current spot rate（%）也就是 central bank base rate 5.1(%)。
在 20X8 年 5 月 1 日那天未到期的基差占总基差的比例，就是看 20X8 年 5 月 1 日距离
20X8 年 6 月 30 日（2 个月） ，占20X8 年 2 月 1 日距离 20X8 年 6 月 30 日（5 个月）
的比例，即 2/5 basis=0.14
基与基差预测出来的期货价格等于 100 减去未来的利率（也就是本题中的 central bank
base rate）再减去未到期的基差。比如未来的 central bank base rate 上涨到 5.9%，那
么基于基差预测出来的期货价格就等于 100-5.9(%)-0.14=93.96。
在未来要借款的情况下，未来利率上涨到 5.9%是利率朝着不利于 Abertafol 公司的方向
变化，所以 Abertafol 公司需要在期货市场上盈利才能实现对冲（即利率的锁定）。
按照高价 94.55 卖出，低价 93.96 买入，所以在期货市场上获得的 gain=(0·9455 –
0·9396) x $500,000 x 3/12 x 64=59 x 12.5 (tick value) x 64 = $47,200，
与实际的借款成本 6·3%(=5.9%+0.40%) x $24m x 4/12 = $504,000 进行对冲，
所以净借款成本=$504,000-$47,200=$456,800，
有效的借款利率是 5.71%=$456,800/$24m x 12/4=6.3%-0.59%。
对比 FRA 的对冲结果 5.05%，净借款成本$378,750。
远期合约的对冲效果相较于期货明显更好。
$18m investment
Options on futures
Buy September call options as need to hedge against a fall in interest rates.
Number of contracts = $18m/$500,000 x 5 months/3 months = 60 contracts
Basis
Current price (1 February) – futures price = basis
(100 – 5·10) – 94·50 = 0·4
Unexpired basis on 1 September = 1/8 x 0·4 = 0·05
Central bank base rate falls to 4·5%
Exercise price                                                                                   94·75
Expected futures price100 – 4·5 – 0·05                                             95·45
Exercise?                                                                                            Yes
Gain in basis points                                                                             70
$
Gain from options0·0070 x 3/12 x $500,000 x 60                            52,500
Investment return4·2% x 5/12 x $18m                                            315,000
Premium0·00298 x $500,000 x 3/12 x 60                                       (22,350)
Net receipt                                                                                    345,150
Effective annual interest rate$345,150/$18m x 12/5                         4·60%
答案解析：
对于未来 20X8 年 9 月 1 日开始的为期 5 个月的存款投资，需要申请的是 9 月 1 日之
后到期的期货合约，也就是 9 月 30 日到期的 Sep contract。
由于是对冲短期存款，所以在期货市场上是先买后卖（go long），考虑到利率期权的
标的资产是利率期货，所以需要买的是 call option（对应的是 right to buy） 。即通过
buy September Call options 来构建对冲。
合约数量同样需要同时考虑金额和期限上的 coverage，毕竟期权协议的标的资产是期
货合约，而每份期货合约的合约期限都只有 3 个月。
根据计算出的合约数量 60 我们可以算出总的期权费支出=0·00298 x $500,000 x 3/12 x
60 = 29.8 x 12.5 x 60 =$22,350
由于我们需要的是 20X8 年 9 月 1 日当天的 future price，所以根据基差按照线性的方
式逐步递减到零。
总的基差是 spot 与 September future 94.50 之间的差额， 鉴于 future 特殊的报价形
式，需要用 100-current spot rate（%）也就是 central bank base rate 5.1(%)。
在 20X8 年 9 月 1 日那天未到期的基差占总基差的比例，就是看 20X8 年 9 月 1 日距离
20X8 年 9 月 30 日（1 个月） ，占20X8 年 2 月 1 日距离 20X8 年 9 月 30 日（8 个月）
的比例，即 1/8 basis=0.05
基与基差预测出来的期货价格等于 100 减去未来的利率（也就是本题中的 central bank
base rate）再减去未到期的基差。比如未来的 central bank base rate 下跌到 4.5%，那
么基于基差预测出来的期货价格就等于 100-4.5(%)-0.05=95.45。
对于期权，我们需要判断是否行权。期权给我们的权利是按照行权价 94.75 买入。也
就是我们需要判断是按照 20X8 年 9 月 1 日那天期货市场的期货价格 95.45 买入划算，
还是按照行权价 94.75 买入划算。买价越低越划算，所以选择按照行权价行权。
通过行权可以相较于期货市场的价格获得 gain = 0.9545-0.9475 = 0.70%，即 Gain from
options = 0.70% x 3/12 x $500,000 x 60 = 70 x 12.5 (tick value) x 60 = $52,500。
与实际的存款收益 4.2%(=4.5%-0.30%) x $18m x 5/12 = $315,000 进行对冲，
所以净投资收益=实际存款收益$315,000 – 期权费$22,350+行权收益$52,500 =
$345,150，
有效的存款年利率是 4.60%=$345,150/$18m x 12/5=4.2%-0.298%+0.70%。
对比 FRA 的对冲结果 5.05%，净存款收益$378,750。
远期合约的对冲效果相较于期权会更好。
Discussion
In each case, the worst-case scenario has been considered, i.e. the higher interest rate
on the loan and the lower interest rate on the investment. For the loan, the futures give
a slightly better result than the FRA and Abertafol Co may choose it for that reason. The
result for the futures is dependent on the assumptions that basis diminishes linearly and
there is no basis risk, which may not be true in practice. The assumption that there is no
margin requirement may not also be true in real-life. The FRA has a theoretical risk of
default as it is an over-the-counter policy, but this should be very small if the
counterparty is a reputable financial institution.
For the investment, the FRA gives the higher guaranteed return if the interest rate falls.
If Abertafol Co is primarily concerned with certainty of cash flow, it will choose the FRA.
If Abertafol Co believes that it is unlikely that interest rates will fall (either because it
believes the governing party will win the election or that the opposition party will not
fulfil its promise to reduce interest rates), it should choose the options compared to the
FRA.
在每种情况下，都考虑了最坏的情况，即较高的贷款利率和较低的投资利率。对于贷
款，期货给出的结果比 FRA 和 Abertafol 公司可能因此选择的结果稍好。期货的结果取
决于基差线性减小且没有基差风险的假设，这在实践中可能不成立。没有保证金要求
的假设在现实生活中可能也不成立。FRA 理论上存在违约风险，因为它是一种场外交
易政策，但如果交易对手是声誉良好的金融机构，这种风险应该非常小。
对于投资而言，如果利率下降，FRA 将提供更高的保证回报。如果 Abertafol 公司主要
关心现金流的确定性，它将选择 FRA。如果 Abertafol 公司认为利率不太可能下降(因为
它认为执政党将赢得选举，或者反对党不会履行其降低利率的承诺)，它应该选择与
FRA 相比的选项。
(b)
Director A
The argument that shareholders do not expect Abertafol Co to use derivatives as it is
not part of their trading purpose could apply if it was looking to make profits out of
trading in derivatives for speculative purposes. Shareholders might question trading for
these reasons and whether use of derivatives was increasing the risk levels they faced.
However, that is not the case here. In these circumstances, derivatives are being used
for hedging purposes, to limit the risks to cash flows the company faces. It could be
argued that shareholders would expect Abertafol Co to take reasonable steps to
manage risks, particularly as levels and direction of interest rate movement are quite
uncertain at present. If the risks are not hedged, Abertafol Co could lose out doubly,
having to pay more interest and receiving less interest than if it took steps to hedge.
Abertafol Co will also generally wish to limit uncertainty when it is budgeting. Using
derivatives limits how much actual payments or receipts could vary from budgeted
figures, whereas the maximum possible variations from budgeted figures if derivatives
are not used are uncertain and could be large.
如果 Abertafol 公司希望从投机目的的衍生品交易中获利，那么股东不希望 Abertafol
公司使用衍生品的论点可能适用，因为这不是他们交易目的的一部分。股东可能会因
为这些原因质疑交易，质疑衍生品的使用是否增加了他们面临的风险水平。
然而，这里的情况并非如此。在这种情况下，衍生品被用于对冲目的，以限制公司面
临的现金流风险。可以说，股东希望 Abertafol 公司采取合理的措施来管理风险，特别
是在利率变动的水平和方向目前相当不确定的情况下。如果不对冲风险，Abertafol 公
司可能会遭受双重损失，与采取对冲措施相比，不得不支付更多利息，而获得的利息
却更少。
Abertafol 公司通常也希望在预算时限制不确定性。使用衍生工具限制了实际支付或收
入与预算数字的差异，而如果不使用衍生工具，与预算数字的最大可能差异是不确定
的，并且可能很大。
Director B
It is true that interest rates might rise or fall, but not to the levels predicted. As regards
the loan, if interest rates did not go up beyond 5·31%, Abertafol Co would end up
paying more as a result of hedging. The terms for the futures and forward rate
agreements reflect market expectations that rates will rise to around this level. This
suggests that the risk of Abertafol Co paying significantly more on the loan as a result
of hedging is small.
As regards the interest rate on the investment, the forward rate is set bearing in mind
the uncertainty about the ultimate direction of interest rate change as well as its
amount. If the opposition party wins the election, the forward rate agreement is likely to
lead to a higher net receipt (receiving 5·05% would imply an offer rate of 5·35% on the
forward rate agreement, when the opposition party is planning to reduce the central
bank base rate below 5·1%). The current government would have to increase the base
rate above 5·35% for the forward rate agreement to be less profitable than not hedging.
诚然，利率可能会上升或下降，但不会达到预期的水平。至于贷款，如果利率不超过
5.31%，Abertafol 公司将最终支付更多作为对冲的结果。期货和远期利率协议的条款反
映了市场对利率将升至这一水平附近的预期。这表明 Abertafol 公司因对冲而大幅增加
贷款支付的风险很小。
至于投资利率，远期利率的设定考虑到了利率变化的最终方向及其金额的不确定性。
如果反对党赢得选举，远期利率协议可能会导致更高的净收益(获得 5.05%将意味着远
期利率协议的报价利率为 5.35%，此时反对党正计划将央行基本利率降至 5.1%以下)。
现任政府必须将基准利率提高到 5.35%以上，远期利率协议的利润才会低于不对冲的情
况。
Director C
Although not evaluated here, if the central bank base rate rose to 5·9%, options would
not be exercised. In this situation, options would represent a less profitable choice than
not hedging because of the premium paid.
Options would be a better choice than not hedging if they were exercised and the
central bank base rate fell below 4·9%, meaning interest received was below 4·6%. This
would imply that the opposition party had won the election and fulfilled its promise to
reduce interest rates. However, if the central bank rate fell to such an extent that
options were exercised, the forward rate agreement would give a higher effective
annual interest rate than options.
Therefore, it is true from this investment’s perspective that options would never be the
best solution whatever the change in interest rates.
虽然这里没有评估，但如果中央银行的基本利率上升到 5.9%，期权就不会被执行。在
这种情况下，由于支付了额外费用，期权比不对冲的利润更低。
如果行使期权，并且中央银行基本利率低于 4.9%，这意味着收到的利息低于 4.6%，期
权将是比不对冲更好的选择。这将意味着反对党赢得了选举，并兑现了降低利率的承
诺。然而，如果央行利率下降到行使期权的程度，远期利率协议将提供比期权更高的
有效年利率。
因此，从这项投资的角度来看，不管利率如何变化，期权永远不会是最好的解决方
案。
(Note: Credit will be given for alternative and valid comments.)
Professional skills marks
Analysis and evaluation
– Appropriate use of the data to determine suitable calculations
– Appropriate use of the data to support discussion, draw appropriate conclusions
and design appropriate responses
Scepticism
– Effective challenge of information and assumptions supplied, and techniques
carried out, to support key facts and/or decisions
– Effective challenge and critical assessment of the information and assumptions
provided
– Demonstration of the ability to probe into the reasons for issues which would be
required to challenge conclusions or recommendations which have already
been reached
Commercial acumen
– Recommendations are practical and plausible in the context of Abertafol Co’s
situation
– Effective use of examples and/or calculations from the scenario information, and
other practical considerations related to the context, to illustrate points being
made
Maximum 5 marks

stem_zh:
要求解析（50 分）
(a) 解释为什么各国可能会对进口采取保护主义措施，以及如果 Amasia 与邻国建立关
税同盟可能带来的经济利益。 （7 分）
(b) 为 Mahoney Co 的董事会准备一份报告，其中：
(i) 计算如果使用多边净额结算来结算未清余额，对集团内现金流的影响;（7 分）
(ii) 计算利用远期和期货市场对冲出售 Oliviera 公司所得收益的结果;（6 分）
(iii) 利用上述（i）和（ii）部分的结果，简要讨论：（5 分）
 结算集团内部净额政策的利弊;
 远期或期货市场是否是对冲 Oliviera 公司出售所得的更好选择;
(iv) 比较使用货币掉期或货币期权对冲项目现金流时，Amasia 重建项目的净现值（单
位：欧元）;（7 分）
(v)基于上述部分（iv）的结果，讨论：（8 分）
 外汇掉期或货外汇期权是否是对冲与 Amasia 项目相关风险的更好选择;
 在估算重建项目净现值时所做的假设;
 是否应该进行重建项目。
专业分数将根据您在回答中表现出的沟通技巧、分析和评估能力、职业怀疑精神和商
业洞察力而获得。（10 分）
Marking scheme for Question 1 Mahoney Co
Professional skills marks
Communication
– General report format and structure (use of headings/sub-headings and an
introduction)
– Style, language and clarity (appropriate layout and tone of report response,
presentation of calculations, appropriate use of the tools)
– Effectiveness of communication (answer is relevant, specific rather than general
and focused to the requirement)
Analysis and evaluation
– Appropriate use of the data to determine suitable calculations
– Appropriate use of the data to support discussion and draw appropriate
conclusions
– Balanced appraisal/use of information objectively to support options, determine
the impact of a course of action, make a recommendation or decision
Scepticism
– Effective challenge of information, evidence and assumptions supplied and
techniques carried out to support key facts and/or decisions
– Demonstration of the ability to probe into the reasons for issues and problems,
including the identification of missing information or additional information,
which would alter the decisions reached by Mahoney Co
Commercial acumen
– Advice is practical and plausible in the context of Mahoney Co’s situation
– Effective use of examples and/or calculations from the scenario information and
other practical considerations related to the context to illustrate points being
made
– Recognition of external constraints and opportunities as necessary
Total 10 marks
Sample answer for Question 1 Mahoney Co
1.
(a)
Rationale for protectionist measures
实施保护主义措施的理由
Many countries impose protectionist measures on imported goods and services to
make them more expensive to buy, therefore restricting demand. In doing so, they aim
to shield or protect their own industries and workers from foreign competition.
许多国家对进口商品和服务实施保护主义措施，使其购买成本更高，从而限制需求。
这样做的目的是保护自己的行业和工人免受外国竞争的影响。
It may be that these are infant industries, which are still developing and, given time,
have the potential to compete globally whereas exposure to the full force of
international competition in the early years of the industry life cycle could damage that
development irreparably. Amasia’s car manufacturing industry may be an example of
such an industry.
这些可能是处于发展初期的行业，它们仍在发展中，如果假以时日，它们有可能具有
全球竞争的潜力，而在行业生命周期的早期，如果面临国际竞争的全面冲击，则可能
会对这种发展造成不可挽回的损害。Amasia 的汽车制造业可能就是这样一个行业的例
子。
Alternatively, the objective may be to protect old industries, such as Amasia’s
agricultural sector. International competition may accelerate the process by which these
industries decline and ultimately collapse, creating the potential for large-scale
unemployment in Amasia and all of the problems that can cause.
或者，目标可能是保护旧产业，例如 Amasia 的农业部门。国际竞争可能会加速这些行
业的衰落并最终崩溃的进程，从而有可能在 Amasia 造成大规模失业，以及造成所有可
能的问题。
The tax revenue derived from imposing import tariffs, for example, may be a major
consideration for Amasia, given the fact that there is a substantial budget deficit. For
emerging markets in particular, this revenue can be significant. By restricting the
demand for imports, protectionist measures may also avoid the problems associated
with a worsening trade deficit, which occurs when the value of a country’s imports
exceeds the value of its exports.
例如，鉴于 Amasia 存在巨额预算赤字，征收进口关税获得税收可能是的一个主要考虑
因素。特别是对于新兴市场来说，这种收入可能非常可观。通过限制进口需求，保护
主义措施还可以避免贸易赤字恶化相关的问题。当一国的进口额超过其出口额时，就
会发生贸易赤字恶化。
Benefits from customs union
关税同盟的好处
A customs union creates a trading bloc which removes protectionist measures on
imports from one country to other countries within the bloc. The key benefit is an
increase in trade and economic growth across the bloc as a whole and this in turn
should help with easing Amasia’s unemployment problem. The customs union also
enables countries to specialise in those industries in which they have a comparative
advantage, which can create the potential for a global competitive advantage.
关税同盟建立了一个贸易集团，消除了从集团内的一个国家进口到其他国家会遭受的
保护主义措施。关键的好处是整个集团的贸易和经济增长的增加，这反过来又有助于
缓解 Amasia 的失业问题。关税同盟还使各国能够专门从事它们具有比较优势的那些行
业，这可以创造全球竞争优势的潜力。
Companies operating within a customs union gain access to a substantially larger
market. This creates a cost advantage due to the economies of scale associated with
larger markets and this ultimately benefits consumers in the form of lower prices.
在关税同盟内经营的公司可以进入更大的市场。由于与较大市场相关的规模经济，这
创造了成本优势，最终以较低价格的形式使消费者受益。
It is not unusual for a country entering into a customs union to negotiate exceptions.
Therefore it may be possible for Amasia to enjoy the benefits of a custom union without
removing the protections from its infant and declining industries.
一个加入关税同盟的国家就例外情况进行谈判并不罕见。因此，Amasia 有可能在不取
消对其新生和衰退工业的保护的情况下，享受关税同盟的好处。
(b)
Report to the board of directors, Mahoney Co
Introduction
This report assesses how Mahoney Co can manage the risk associated with various
transactions. In particular, it evaluates the policy to use multilateral netting to settle
intra-group balances and compares the methods used to hedge both Oliviera Co’s
disposal proceeds and the Amasian project’s cash flows. The report then discusses the
assumptions made before concluding on the suitability of the project in Amasia.
本报告评估 Mahoney 公司如何管理与各种交易相关的风险。特别是，它评估了使用多
边净额结算制度结算集团间内部净额的政策，并比较了用于对冲 Oliviera 公司的出售
收益和 Amazian 项目现金流的方法。然后，报告讨论了就该项目在 Amasia 的适用性
作出结论之前所作的假设。
Intra-group settlements
The cash flow impact from Mahoney Co’s multilateral netting policy is as follows:
According to Appendix 1, Yves Co pays €14·6m to Mahoney Co and then €132·4m to
Oliviera Co. Imran Co pays €82·4m to Oliviera Co.
Benefits of multilateral netting
多边净额结算的好处
Multilateral netting allows Mahoney Co to substantially reduce the number of cross-
border transfers within the group. This saves time and also reduces the transaction
costs associated with intra-group settlements. Any risk of non-payment is also spread
across the group.
多边净额结算使 Mahoney 公司能够大幅减少集团内跨境转账的数量。节省了时间，也
降低了与集团内部结算相关的交易成本。任何不付款的风险也会在整个集团内分摊。
Potential problems associated with multilateral netting
与多边净额结算有关的潜在问题
There are a number of disadvantages associated with the plan to introduce multilateral
netting. First, there may be legal issues to consider because some countries impose
restrictions on multilateral netting to protect their financial sector. Second, settlements
can be made at any forward date agreed to by the group but six months seems
excessive. Finally, if Oliviera Co is sold, as planned, in six months’ time, the terms of sale
would need to be investigated to check whether the settlement is still due.
采用多边净额结算的计划有一些不利之处。首先，可能需要考虑法律的问题，因为一
些国家为了保护其金融部门而对多边净额结算施加限制。第二，可以在集团商定的任
何远期日期进行结算，但六个月似乎太长了。最后，如果 Oliviera 公司按计划在六个月
内被出售，则需要调查销售条款，以检查结算是否仍未到期。
Hedging of Oliviera Co’s disposal proceeds
对冲 Oliviera 公司的处置所得
Both the forward and future markets suggest there may be a depreciation of the BRL
relative to the euro over the coming months. This would result in a material decline in
the euro value of the disposal proceeds if the transaction was not hedged. Given the
magnitude of the amount due, even very small movements in the exchange rate could
lead to a material loss for Mahoney Co under these circumstances, which suggests it is
advisable to hedge since the proceeds are due to be used to repay the bridging loan.
远期和期货市场都表明，未来几个月 BRL 相对于欧元可能会贬值。如果交易没有进行
套期保值，这将导致处置收益的欧元价值大幅下跌。鉴于应付金额的数额，在这种情
况下，即使汇率的非常小的变动也可能导致 Mahoney 公司的重大损失，这表明对冲是
可取的，因为所得款项将用于偿还过渡性贷款。
Appendix 2 shows both hedging methods result in broadly similar outcomes although
the futures market outcome is marginally better compared to the forward. Since the
amount to be hedged is not known with certainty and there is also a risk the transaction
may not happen at all, the futures hedge may be more attractive as the contracts can
be sold before the maturity date, whereas the forward must be fulfilled. In theory, both
methods fix the exchange rate but in practice futures contracts are exposed to basis risk
since Mahoney Co will close out the September contracts two months before maturity.
Basis risk creates uncertainty about the actual futures market outcome, which may end
up being more or less than the estimated receipt of €122·38m. Futures contracts also
suffer from a cash flow disadvantage, since they are marked-to-market daily until the
futures contracts are closed out.
附录 2 显示，两种对冲方法的结果大致相似，尽管期货市场的结果略好于远期。由于
要对冲的金额并不确定，而且交易可能根本不会发生，因此期货对冲可能更具吸引
力，因为合约可以在到期日之前出售，而远期必须履行。理论上，这两种方法都固定
了汇率，但实际上，期货合约面临基差风险，因为 Mahoney 公司将在到期前两个月结
清 9 月合约。基差风险会给实际的期货市场的结果带来不确定性，最终可能会对于或
少于估计的 122.38m 欧元。期货合约也存在现金流劣势，因为它们每天都是按照逐日
盯市制度结算的，直到期货合约被平仓。
If the board is risk averse, the forward may be the preferred hedging method since the
amount received is only marginally lower and would remove any uncertainty for the
purposes of repaying the bridging loan. However, the directors will need to assess the
exposure to counterparty risk first.
如果董事会是厌恶分险的，远期可能是首选的对冲方法，因为收到的金额只是略低，
并且可以消除偿还过度性贷款的任何不确定性。然而，董事需要首先评估交易对手风
险的敞口大小。
Regeneration project in Amasia
Amasia 的重建项目
Currency swap and currency option outcomes
货币互换和货币期权结果
Given the depreciation of the dollar over the investment period, the currency swap rate
is clearly beneficial. A significant portion of the project’s value is wrapped up in the final
year cash flow, mainly due to the transfer proceeds received at the end of the
investment period. Without the currency swap, these proceeds would be converted into
euros at the final year expected exchange rate of $/€17·94, which is substantially less
favourable than the rate agreed to under the terms of the swap. That said, Appendix 3
shows that the project does not appear to be viable even with the benefit of a swap
since the net present value (NPV) is negative. The currency swap is also exposed to
counterparty risk.
考虑到美元在投资期间的贬值，货币互换利率显然是有益的。该项目价值的很大一部
分包含在最后一年的现金流中，主要是由于在投资期末收到的转让收益。如果没有货
币互换，这些收益将按最后一年的预期汇率$/€17·94 兑换成欧元，这远低于互换条款
下商定的汇率。也就是说，附录 3 表明，即使有互换的好处，该项目似乎也不可行，
因为净现值是负的。外汇掉期也面临交易对手风险。
The outcome from the currency option is significantly worse, mainly due to the cost of
the premium. Based on the information provided, the option would be exercised at the
end of the project. Unlike the currency swap, however, the option benefits from upside
potential. If the dollar strengthens sufficiently, it is possible the NPV would be positive.
However, this seems unlikely based on purchasing power parity theory, which predicts a
significant weakening of the dollar.
外汇期权的结果要差得多，这主要是由于期权费的成本。根据所提供的信息，该期权
将在项目结束时行权。然而，与货币掉期不同的是，该期权受益于上行潜力。如果美
元充分走强，净现值可能为正。然而，根据购买力平价理论，这似乎不太可能，该理
论预测美元将大幅贬值。
Assumptions
It is assumed that the inputs provided are credible. For example, it is assumed that the
investment cost, net operating fee, transfer proceeds, spot rate, inflation rates, swap
rate, discount rate and the option premium are estimated accurately. It is also assumed
that the discount rate remains constant throughout. Minor changes to any of these
inputs may be sufficient to change the outcome of the calculations.
假设所提供的数据是可信的。例如，假设投资成本、净经营费、转让收益、即期汇
率、通货膨胀率、掉期利率、折现率和期权费都得到了准确估计。同时假设折现率始
终保持不变。任何上述数据的轻微变动可能足以改变计算结果。
It is worth investigating these assumptions, particularly when the NPV is so marginal.
For example, the operating fee is relatively static throughout the investment period but
if Amasia joins a customs union with its neighbours, there is the potential for a
significant increase in trade. The operating fee is based on the volume of traffic through
the port so this input may increase more than the estimates provided suggest.
这些假设是值得研究的，特别是当净现值是如此微不足道的时候。例如，在整个投资
期间，经营费用相对稳定，但如果 Amasia 与邻国加入关税同盟，贸易就有可能大幅增
加。运营费是根据港口的交通量计算的，因此该投入增长可能会超过提供的估计数。
There may also be room to improve the terms of the swap or to find an alternative
swap partner on more favourable terms. Given that the NPV is only very slightly
negative, a very small improvement in these terms may be enough to turn the NPV
positive. For example, there may be room to negotiate the rate at which the swap of
principal occurs at the end of the project. Alternatively, it may be worth negotiating the
transfer proceeds with the Amasian government.
此外，也可能有改进掉期条款或以更优惠条件找到替代掉期合作伙伴的余地。鉴于净
现值只是非常微小的负值，上述方面的非常小的改善可能足以使净现值变为正值。例
如，在项目结束时，可能存在协商本金互换率的余地。或者，可能值得与 Amasia 政府
谈判转让收益。
The NPV may also understate the true value of the project since this is only the first
phase of the port’s regeneration. The experience Mahoney Co gains on this project may
lead to additional work during subsequent phases of the port’s regeneration. This is an
example of a real option which has the potential to add value to a project but is ignored
by conventional NPV methodology.
净现值也可能低估了该项目的真正价值，因为这只是港口重建的第一阶段。Mahoney
公司在该项目上获得的经验可能会导致港口重建后续阶段产生额外的工作。这是一个
实务期权的例子，它有可能增加项目的价值，但被传统的净现值方法所忽略。
Conclusion
The intra-group settlement from Yves Co and the disposal proceeds from the
divestment of Oliviera Co are expected to generate a receipt in excess of €136m in six
months’ time. The board will need to compare this amount to the value of the bridging
loan to identify any shortfall.
来自 Yves 公司的集团内部结算和 Oliviera 公司剥离的处置所得预计将在六个月内产生
超过 1.36 亿欧元的收入。董事会将需要将这一数额与过渡性贷款的价值进行比较，以
确定任何短缺。
Based on the financial analysis, the regeneration project in Amasia should be rejected
since the NPV is negative. However, the value of the project may be understated since it
seems to ignore a potential follow-on option. Furthermore, the NPV is only marginally
negative so it may be possible to negotiate the terms of the swap with the counterparty
or the value of the transfer proceeds expected from the Amasian government in a way
which would lead to a positive NPV. Since the value of the project is only a marginal
loss, it is also recommended that the board undertake sensitivity and scenario analysis.
根据财务分析，由于净现值为负数，应拒绝在 Amazia 的重建项目。然而，该项目的价
值可能被低估，因为它似乎忽略了一个潜在的后续选择。此外，净现值仅为轻微负
值，因此可能通过与交易对手协商互换条款或预期从 Amasia 政府获得的转让收益价
值，从而导致净现值变为正。由于项目价值只是边际损失，因此还建议董事会进行敏
感性分析和情景分析。

1. Introduction - Littlebredy Co
Littlebredy Co is a supplier of furniture and equipment. Littlebredy Co is listed on its

Littlebredy 公司的董事会目前正在考虑两个主要的投资项目。一个是投资生产办公舱

3. Schools and universities investment
Littlebredy Co has not previously supplied furniture and equipment to schools and

可以假设所有成本和收入都考虑了通胀。适用的资本成本为 11%，无风险利率为 3%。

4. Reporting of investment strategy
Littlebredy Co’s board feels that the company has been too dependent on demand
from the office sector. Hence it is looking at the investment in the furniture and
equipment for schools and universities. It is also considering the production of furniture
for other types of organisations. The board believes that decisions it is considering now
about investment policy will be important for the future direction of the company. The
board does not want to disclose its plans in detail until they are certain, for commercial
reasons.
Littlebredy 公司的董事会认为，该公司过于依赖写字楼行业的需求。因此，它正在考
虑为学校和大学的家具和设备进行投资。它还在考虑为其他类型的组织生产家具。董
事会认为，目前正在考虑的投资政策决定对公司未来的发展方向至关重要。出于商业
原因，董事会不想在确定之前披露其计划的细节。
Littlebredy Co fulfils statutory reporting regulations and complies with the requirements
of the corporate governance code to produce an annual business review. However, it
has faced investor and media criticism that the analysis and commentary on the
business which it publishes in its business review is insufficient. Recently, Littlebredy Co’s
business review has been primarily a detailed commentary on highlighted figures from
the financial statements in the annual report. The main criticisms of it have been that it
does not disclose clearly the business’s future investment strategies and discuss its
results in the context of achieving its strategic objectives.
Littlebredy 公司遵守法定报告规定，并遵守企业治理准则的规定，编制年度业务审查
报告。然而，它面临着投资者和媒体的批评，认为其在业务评论中发布的对业务的分
析和评论是不足的。最近，Littlebredy 公司的业务回顾主要是对年度报告中财务报表
中突出显示的数字进行详细评论。对它的主要批评是，它没有明确披露企业未来的投
资战略，也没有在实现其战略目标的背景下讨论其结果。
Media comment suggests that the lack of clear information about Littlebredy Co’s
strategies has been the main reason why its share price has recently fallen.
媒体评论认为缺乏关于 Littlebredy 公司战略明确信息是其股价最近下跌的主要原因。
Requirements (25 marks)
(a)(i) Evaluate the financial acceptability of the investment in the office pods.
(7 marks)
(a)(ii) Evaluate, using the Black-Scholes pricing model, whether Littlebredy Co
should proceed with the investment in the furniture and equipment for schools
and universities.
(4 marks)
(b) Discuss the extent to which the investment in furniture and equipment for
schools and universities would represent diversification for Littlebredy Co.
(5 marks)
(c) Advise Littlebredy Co on what changes to make to its reporting to provide more
information about the rationale for, and the factors affecting, its future investment
strategies.
(4 marks)
Professional marks will be awarded for the demonstration of skill in analysis and
evaluation, scepticism and commercial acumen in your answer.
(5 marks)

stem_zh:
要求解析（25 分）
(a) (i) 评估办公室吊舱投资的财务可接受性。（7 分）
(a) (ii) 使用 Black-Scholes 定价模型评估 Littlebredy 公司是否应继续投资中小学和大学
的家具和设备。（4 分）
(b) 讨论对中小学和大学家具和设备的投资在多大程度上代表了 Littlebredy 公司的多样
化。（5 分）
(c) 向 Littlebredy 公司提供关于对其报告作何修改的咨询意见，以便就其未来投资战略
的理由和影响其因素提供更多信息。（4 分）
专业分数将根据您在回答中表现出的分析和评估能力、职业怀疑精神和商业洞察力而
获得。 （5 分）
Marking scheme for Question 2 Littlebredy Co
Professional skills marks
Analysis and evaluation
– Appropriate use of the data to determine suitable calculations
– Appropriate use of the data to support discussion, draw appropriate conclusions
and design appropriate responses–Demonstration of ability to consider relevant
factors applicable to a given course of action
Scepticism
– Appropriate application of professional judgement to draw conclusions and
make informed decisions about the courses of action which are appropriate in
the context of the engagement
Commercial acumen
– Effective use of examples and/or calculations from the scenario information and
other practical considerations related to the context to illustrate points being
made
– Recognition of external constraints and opportunities as necessary
Total 5 marks
Sample answer for Question 2 Littlebredy Co
2.
(a) (i)
Workings
计算
explanation_zh:
对于办公舱投资进行投资评估。
首先根据题目条件直接给与的四年的 contribution，从中扣除按照要求逐年增长的
fixed costs。这道题需要注意的是项目的残值是需要交税的，所以在计算 cash flows
before tax 时需要将残值考虑进去，然后按照 20%的税率在当年交完税，再将初始投资
以及对于营运资本的投资考虑进去。
这道题营运资本的计算相对来水比较常规，营运资本每年的持有水平是占销售收入的
10%，所以根据营运资本每年的持有水平推算每年年初需要 incremental 的部分，最后
一年的营运资本在第四年年末一次性结转收回。
最后按照题目条件直接给的 11%的折现率进行折现，算出项目的净现值。
The NPV is positive, which indicates the project should be undertaken. However, there
are many assumptions on which the NPV is based and a change in any one can change
the NPV and the decision. For example, the amount of the working capital may increase
and/or it may not be recovered which would reduce the NPV or the cost of capital may
increase also reducing the NPV. The company needs to assess the likelihood of changes
to the variables before a decision is taken.
净现值为正，这表明该项目应该进行。然而，净现值基于许多假设，任何一个假设的
变化都可能改变净现值结果和对应决策。例如，营运资本的金额可能增加和/或可能无
法收回，这将减少净现值，或者资本成本可能增加，也减少净现值。公司需要在做出
决定之前评估变量变化的可能性。
(a) (ii) Black-Scholes model
The option to make a follow-on investment is a call option, so according to the BSOP
option pricing model, the value of the option to make a follow-on investment is
approximately $5.1m.
Overall value = $5.1m – $7m = –$1.9m
The investment still has a negative present value despite the option, so should be
rejected on those grounds.
计算解析：
根据题目条件直接提供的实务期权的五个变量，结合当地政府提供的是一个 option to
follow-on，利用 BSOP calculator 可以比较容易得出 call option 的价值是$5.1m。
在项目考虑了实务期权的价值后，项目的整体价值就会从原来的-$7m 变成-$1.9m。
(b) Diversification has two aspects: product and market development.
多样化有两个方面：产品和市场开发。
Product development
产品开发
Supplying schools and universities would represent a limited product diversification by
producing some different products to what would be supplied for offices. However,
Littlebredy Co would remain a supplier of furniture, as it is for offices. For both schools
and offices, supply would be a combination of replacing existing furniture and
equipment for current buildings, which is likely to be a steady market, and supplying
new furniture and equipment, either for new buildings or because of technological
developments or other factors affecting what customers require.
向学校和大学供应产品将代表有限的产品多样化，因为生产的产品与向办公室供应的
产品不同。然而，Littlebredy 公司仍将是家具供应商，就像办公室家具一样。对于学
校和办公室来说，供应将是为现有建筑物更换现有家具和设备的组合，这可能是一个
稳定的市场，既可以为新建筑物，又可以为由于技术发展或影响客户需求的其他因素
而供应新家具和设备。
Market development
市场发展
Supplying schools and universities is a different market from supplying offices, but how
much this represents effective diversification will be determined by how much demand
in these markets is influenced by the same factors. To some extent, economic
circumstances will determine demand in both markets. Poor economic circumstances
will limit new office buildings and demand from existing offices, and may also limit
government tax revenues, capping the amount which can be spent on education.
供应学校和大学与供应办公室是不同的市场，但这在多大程度上代表了有效的多样
化，将取决于这些市场的需求在多大程度上受到相同因素影响的程度。在某种程度
上，经济环境将决定这两个市场的需求。糟糕的经济状况将限制对新办公楼和对现有
办公楼的需求，也可能限制政府的税收收入，限制可用于教育的花销。
However, political imperatives, here the priority given to education, will have a
significant impact on the demand from educational institutions, with demand from
offices much less likely to be affected by government policies. Other government
policies, such as whether contracts are awarded on a competitive, open-tender basis or
given to preferred, government-linked suppliers, may determine how far Littebredy Co
can access the education sector.
然而，政治需要，即对教育的优先地位，将对教育机构的需求产生重大影响，而对办
公室的需求不太可能受到政府政策的影响。其他政府政策，例如合同是以竞争性的公
开招标的基础上授予的，还是授予与政府有联系的首选供应商，可能决定 Littebredy
公司能在多大程度上进入教育部门。
The upgrade of furniture and equipment for technological developments is likely to be
at a different pace for offices and educational establishments so it is possible that this
represents effective diversification for Littlebredy Co.
对于办公室和教育机构来说，家具和设备的技术发展升级可能会以不同的速度进行，
因此这可能代表了 Littlebredy 公司的有效多样化。
(c)
Provision of more information
As a first stage, Littlebredy Co needs to communicate better with major shareholders to
find out what their requirements are. These may result in Littlebredy Co producing more
information than legislation and the governance code require, for example, more detail
about the impact of government decisions about education on the demand for its
products, and more performance indicators than are currently shown in its annual
report and business review.
作为第一阶段，Littlebredy 公司需要与主要股东更好地沟通，以了解他们的要求是什
么。这可能导致 Littlebredy 公司提供的信息超过立法和治理准则的要求，例如，关于
政府教育决策对其产品需求影响的更多详细信息，以及比目前在其年度报告和业务审
查中显示的更多的绩效指标。
It is true that commercial confidentiality may restrict the reporting of plans for specific
investments while they are being formulated, but Littlebredy Co should be able to
outline the major areas of product and market development which it is pursuing to fulfil
its strategies.
诚然，商业机密可能会限制在制定特定投资计划时对其进行报告，但 Littlebredy 公司
应能够概述成 为实现其战略 而正在寻求的 产品和市场开发 的主要领域。
Business review
业务回顾
In particular, it appears that Littlebredy Co’s board is taking a minimal approach to
disclosure of information about its planned strategies. Although it is doing enough to
fulfil legislative requirements and has produced a business review in line with the
corporate governance code, the principles upon which the code is based would require
the business review to be meaningful. This would mean that the business review should
discuss the investment decisions which Littlebredy Co has made in the context of its
overall business objectives and strategies going forward.
特别是，Littlebredy 公司的董事会似乎正在采取最低限度的方法来披露有关其计划战
略的信息。虽然它在满足立法要求方面做得足够多了，并根据公司治理守则进行了业
务审查，但准则所依据的原则要求业务审查具有意义。这意味着业务审查应讨论
Littlebredy 公司在其整体业务目标和未来战略的背景下做出的投资决策。
Littlebredy Co may decide to produce an integrated report, meaning that it would need
to discuss how its investment strategies will deliver value over various timeframes in the
future. It will also need to describe the business model underpinning its investment
policies.
Littlebredy 公司可能会决定制作一份综合报告，这意味着它需要讨论其投资策略将如
何在未来的不同时间范围内创造价值。它还需要说明支持其投资政策的商业模式。
(Note: Credit will be given for alternative and valid discursive comments)
The following exhibits, available on the left-hand side of the screen, provide information
relevant to the question:
1. Garnod Co – an introduction to Garnod Co and its two potential takeover targets
2. Pilsur Co
3. Marhew Co
This information should be used to answer the question requirements within your
chosen response option(s).
屏幕左侧的下列图表提供了与该问题有关的信息：
1. Garnod 公司-介绍 Garnod 公司及其两个潜在的收购目标
2. Pilsur 公司
3. Marhew 公司
此信息应用于回答您所选回答选项中的问题要求。
1. Garnod Co – an introduction to Garnod Co and its two potential takeover targets
Garnod Co was established 12 years ago to provide courses for accountancy
qualifications. A major reason for Garnod Co’s success has been that it has been quicker
than its competitors to  develop  profitable  e-learning  course  packages.  Apart  from
its  founders,  Garnod  Co’s  staff   turnover has been quite rapid. Some staff  have not
stayed long, either because they are ambitious staff  who have made a contribution but
sought career progression elsewhere or because they have been quickly dismissed.
Garnod 公司成立于 12 年前，提供会计资格课程。Garnod 公司成功的一个主要原因
是，它比竞争对手更快地开发出了有利可图的在线学习课程包。 除了创始人，Garnod
公司的员工人员流动相当迅速。有些工作人员没有呆很长时间，要么是因为他们是有
抱负的工作人员，已经作出了贡献，还想再其他地方寻求职业发展，要么是因为他们
很快被解雇了。
Garnod Co was listed three years ago on its country’s stock market for smaller
companies. It has since developed governance mechanisms in compliance with stock
market regulations. Some of   its  non-executive  directors  and  investors  feel  that  its
culture  is  still  too  informal  for  a  listed  company.
Garnod 公司三年前在该国的小型公司股票市场（类似科创板）上市。此后，它制定了
符合股票市场法规的治理机制。一些非执行董事和投资者认为，对于一家上市公司来
说，其文化仍然不够正式。
Garnod Co’s executive directors are looking to expand the company into new areas of
training, where there is potential for cross-selling courses and further opportunities for
development of  e-learning packages.
Garnod 公司的执行董事正在寻求将公司扩展到新的培训领域，这些领域中有交叉销售
课程的潜力，并有进一步开发在线学习软件包的机会。
Garnod Co’s board has identified two possible target companies, Pilsur Co and Marhew
Co.
Garnod 公司董事会已经确定了两家可能的目标公司，Pilsur 公司和 Marhew 公司。
2. Pilsur Co
Pilsur Co’s situation
Pilsur Co has offered classroom courses for legal qualifications and professional
development courses  in  areas  of   law,  tax  and  regulation  for  over  30  years.  Pilsur
Co  is  also  listed  on  the  smaller company stock exchange on which Garnod Co is
listed. For a long time, Pilsur Co was a leading company in the area of  legal training
and its directors and some staff  have been with the company for most of  its life. The
company has a well-defined management structure, with seniority and classroom
experience being important attributes required for promotion. However, in  recent
years,  revenue  and  profit  growth  has  been  slower  than  Garnod  Co’s,  because  of
increased competition and Pilsur Co’s failure to develop effective e-learning products.
30 多年来，Pilsur 公司在法律、税务和监管领域提供法律资格面授课程和专业发展课
程。 Pilsur 公司还在 Garnod 公司上市的小型公司证券交易所上市。长期以来，Pilsur
公司是法律培训领域的领先公司，其董事和一些员工在公司的大部分时间里都在公司
工作。公司拥有明确的管理结构，资历和课堂经验是晋升所需的重要条件。然而，近
年来，由于竞争加剧和 Pilsur 公司未能开发出有效的在线学习产品，收入和利润增长
一直慢于 Garnod 公司。
The following recent financial data relates to the two companies:
Garnod Co Pilsur Co
Number of  $1 equity shares 80 million 100 million
Share price $6.00 $5.40
Free cash flows to equity $60 million $70 million
Additionally, Pilsur Co’s equity beta is 1·4 and its asset beta is 1·2. The expected growth
rate in Pilsur Co’s free cash flows to equity is 1·5% per year.
The current risk-free rate is 3·8% and the market risk premium is 8%.
Garnod Co’s finance director believes that the acquisition could generate annually $9
million of free cash flow synergies. The multiple of free cash flows to equity is 8 for
Garnod Co before the acquisition and can be assumed to increase by 5% for the
combined company if the acquisition takes place. The finance director believes that
Pilsur Co’s shareholders would, at a minimum, accept a premium of 14% on the current
price of its shares, although she thinks that the shares may be overvalued at the current
share price and that a free cash flow to equity valuation should be used instead. Garnod
Co’s board has set a target of 60% of the gains on acquisition accruing to its own
shareholders.
Garnod 公司的财务总监认为，此次收购可以产生每年 900 万美元的自由现金流协同效
应。在收购前，Garnod 公司股东可以自由支配的现金流倍数为 8，如果收购发生，可
以假设合并后的公司将增加 5%。财务总监认为，Pilsur 公司的股东至少会接受其当前
股价 14%的溢价，尽管她认为当前股价的股票可能被高估，应该使用自由现金流对股
权估值。Garnod 公司的董事会设定的目标是将收购收益的 60%归自己的股东所有。
Defence strategies 防御策略
Pilsur Co’s directors are aware that Garnod Co may be interested in acquiring their
company. The directors would not welcome a bid from Garnod Co, as they feel that it
would result in major changes to how the company operates and threaten their own
jobs. Two possible defence strategies have been suggested if Garnod Co makes a bid
for the company.
One is seeking an alternative, more welcome, bidder for Pilsur Co. The other is Pilsur Co
making a counter-offer to acquire Garnod Co.
Pilsur 公司的董事们意识到 Garnod 公司可能有兴趣收购他们的公司。董事们不欢迎
Garnod 公司的收购，因为他们认为这将导致公司运营方式发生重大变化，并威胁到他
们自己的工作。如果 Garnod 公司出价收购该公司，有两种可能的防御策略被提出。
一个是为 Pilsur 公司寻找更受欢迎的替代竞标者。另一个是 Pilsur 公司反过来收购
Garnod 公司。
3. Marhew Co
Marhew Co is an unlisted company which is smaller than Garnod Co or Pilsur Co. The
company was founded five years ago by husband and wife, Richard and Katy, who own
80% of its share capital between them. The company provides professional development
training in areas such as management and personal skills, also training in legal
requirements such as health and safety. Richard  and  Katy  have  recruited  lecturers
whom  they  feel  will  work  well  with  them,  and  have  given lecturers considerable
autonomy in delivering courses and gaining new work. The board consists of  Richard
and Katy and two other lecturers, but in practice Richard and Katy make all major
decisions themselves.
Marhew Co’s revenues and profits have increased in the last two years at a greater %
rate than either Garnod Co or Pilsur Co. Marhew Co has developed a limited number of
computer-based courses, but has had insufficient funds to develop significant in-house
e-learning capabilities.
Richard and Katy have indicated that they are willing to discuss a bid with Garnod Co.
Marhew 公司是一家非上市公司，规模小于 Garnod 公司或 Pilsur 公司。该公司由理查
德（Richard）和凯蒂（Katy）于五年前创立，他们拥有这家公司 80% 的股份。该公司
提供管理和个人技能等领域的专业发展培训，以及健康和安全等法律要求的培训。理
查德和凯蒂招募了他们认为可以与他们合作良好的讲师，并赋予讲师相当大的自主权
来教授课程和获得新工作。董事会由理查德和凯蒂以及另外两名讲师组成，但实际上
理查德和凯蒂自己做所有重大决定。
Marhew 公司的收入和利润在过去两年中的增长速度高于 Garnod 公司或 Pilsur 公司。
理查德和凯蒂表示，他们愿意与 Garnod 公司讨论竞标。
Requirements (25 marks)
(a) Analyse the suitability of Pilsur Co and Marhew Co as possible takeover targets
for Garnod Co.
Note: No calculations are required for part (a).
(6 marks)
(b) Calculate:
• the minimum price which Pilsur Co’s shareholders are expected to accept;
• the target price which Garnod Co would pay, based on a free cash flow to
equity valuation, on the basis of 60% of the gains from the acquisition accruing to
its shareholders;
• the percentage of gains from the acquisition which would accrue to Garnod
Co’s shareholders if Garnod Co paid the minimum price which Pilsur Co’s
shareholders are expected to accept, based on a free cash flow to equity valuation.
Note: No discussion is required for part (b).
(9 marks)
(c) Discuss the feasibility and effectiveness of the defence strategies suggested to
fight a takeover bid for Pilsur Co.
(5 marks)
Professional marks will be awarded for the demonstration of skill in analysis and
evaluation, scepticism and commercial acumen in your answer.
(5 marks)

stem_zh:
要求解析（25 分）
(a) 分析 Pilsur 公司和 Marhew 公司是否适合作为 Garnod 公司的可能收购目标。
注意：（a）部分无需计算。（6 分）
(b) 计算：（9 分）
• Pilsur 公司的股东应接受的最低价格;
• Garnod 公司根据自由现金流与股权估值的关系，根据其股东获得的收购收益的 60%
所 支付的目标价格;
• 如果 Garnod 公司支付了 Pilsur 公司股东预期接受的最低价格，则 Garnod 公司股东
将获得的收购收益百分比，该价格基于自由现金流与股权估值的比率。
注意：（b）部分无需讨论。（9 分）
(c) 讨论为抵抗对 Pilsur 公司的收购要约而建议的防御战略的可行性和有效性。（5 分）
专业分数将根据您在回答中表现出的分析和评估能力、职业怀疑精神和商业洞察力而
获得。 （5 分）
Marking scheme for Question 3 Garnod Co
Professional skills marks
Analysis and evaluation
– Appropriate use of the data to determine suitable calculations
– Appropriate use of the data to support discussion, draw appropriate conclusions
and design appropriate responses
– Demonstration of reasoned judgement when considering key organisational
matters and impacts
Scepticism
– Demonstration of the ability to probe into the reasons for issues and problems,
which would be required to challenge proposed courses of action
Commercial acumen
– Effective use of examples and/or calculations from the scenario information and
other practical considerations related to the context to illustrate points being
made
– Recognition of possible consequences of past and future actions and decisions,
for example, when exercising certain choices
Total 5 marks
Sample answer for Question 3 Garnod Co
3.
(a)
Strategic fit 战略契合
The most important reason for acquiring either company is strategic fit, whether they
would enhance what Garnod Co currently offers or offer opportunities for further
development. Although Pilsur Co appears to operate in a complementary area to
Garnod Co, in some ways it does not appear attractive. It may be easier for Garnod Co
to develop law and tax compliance courses itself with its existing resources and
recruiting extra staff required individually, rather than going through the formalities and
likely conflicts in acquiring Pilsur Co, a company which has not been very successful
recently. The main area in which Garnod Co could develop Pilsur Co’s business is e-
learning. Here, Garnod Co’s success in developing e-learning in its area could
complement Pilsur Co.
收购这两家公司的最重要原因是战略契合，无论它们是否会增强 Garnod 公司目前提供
的产品，还是提供进一步发展的机会。虽然 Pilsur 公司似乎是在一个与 Garband 公司
互补的领域运营，但在某些方面它似乎并不具有吸引力。对于 Garnod 公司来说，利用
其现有资源开发法律和税务合规课程并单独招聘额外的员工可能更容易，而不需要面
临收购 Pilsur 公司的各项手续和可能面临的冲突，毕竟该公司最近并不太成功。
Garnod 公司可以发展 Pilsur 公司的业务主要是在线学习。在这里，Garnod 公司在其领
域开发在线学习的成功可以为 Pilsur 公司提供帮助。
Marhew Co offers wider opportunities to provide professional development courses to
Garnod Co’s existing clients. It also offers a new client base for Garnod Co to sell its own
courses. Much of Marhew Co’s business is personal skills training, where it may be more
difficult to develop e-learning packages. However, there may be scope to develop
packages in areas where lots of people have to be trained, for example, health and
safety courses. Marhew Co has also been more successful at developing its business
recently and it is quite possible that its team is more motivated than Pilsur Co’s staff.
Marhew 公司为 Garnod 公司的现有客户提供更广泛的专业发展课程。它还为 Garnod
公司提供了一个新的客户群，以销售自己的课程。Marhew 公司的大部分业务是个人技
能培训，在这方面开发在线学习软件包可能更困难。然而，在需要培训大量人员的领
域，例如健康和安全课程，可能还有制定一揽子计划的余地。最近，Marhew 公司在发
展业务方面也取得了更大的成功，其团队很可能比 Pilsur 公司的员工更有动力。
Income streams 收入来源
Garnod Co’s directors must also consider the risks attached to the income streams
offered by the two targets. Pilsur Co’s revenues have not been growing quickly recently,
but the company operates in areas where training will always be needed, either to
obtain qualifications or to provide professional updates in areas where regulations
change regularly. Marhew Co’s revenue stream is smaller, the company is less well-
established and it operates in areas which could grow significantly but which may be
vulnerable if the organisations which Marhew Co serves decide to cut back on their
training. These risks, together with Marhew Co being unlisted, may make it less easy to
value, although this may mean that it is more likely to be undervalued by its
management than if it were listed.
Garnod 公司的董事还必须考虑这两个目标提供的收入所带来的风险。Pilsur 公司的收
入最近增长不快，但该公司在始终需要培训的领域开展业务，要么是为了获得资格，
要么是为了在法规定期变化的领域提供专业更新。Marhew 公司的收入来源较小，公司
不太成熟，其运营领域可能会显着增长，但如果 Marhew 公司服务的组织决定削减培
训，这些领域可能会很脆弱。这些风险，加上 Marhew 公司未上市，可能会使其估值
变得不那么容易，尽管这可能意味着它比上市时更有可能被其管理层低估。
Shareholders 股东
The shareholder base of the two companies must also be considered. All Garnod Co
needs to do to obtain a controlling interest in Marhew Co is to buy the shares of two
shareholders, Richard and Katy. As Pilsur Co is listed, it is likely to have a larger number
of shareholders. It may be more difficult and time-consuming to convince enough
shareholders to sell their shares.
还必须考虑两家公司的股东基础。要获得 Marhew 公司的控股权，Garnod 公司需要做
的就是购买两位股东 Richard 和 Katy 的股份。随着 Pilsur 公司的上市，它可能会拥有
更多的股东。而说服足够多的股东出售他们的股票可能更加困难和耗时。
Post-acquisition operations 收购后的运作
If it acquires either company, Garnod Co faces the choice of whether to allow it to
operate as a quasi-independent entity or completely absorbing it. There are arguments
against the quasi-independent model: Pilsur Co because of its lack of success and
resistance to change if its directors’ attitudes are shared by its staff; Marhew Co because
of the agency issues that its staff may be loyal to Richard and Katy rather than Garnod
Co. The disparity in size may make it easier to completely absorb Marhew Co,
particularly if Richard and Katy become part of Garnod Co’s management team and
Marhew Co’s staff can be shown the attractive opportunities available in a larger firm.
如果收购任何一家公司，Garnod 公司都将面临选择：是允许其作为准独立实体运营，
还是完全将其吸收。有人反对准独立模式：Pilsur 公司是因为缺乏成功，如果其董事的
态度与员工一致，它就会抵制变革；Marhew 公司因为代理问题，其员工可能忠于
Richard 和 Katy 而不是 Garnod 公司。规模上的差异可能使完全吸收 Marhew 公司变得
更加容易，特别是如果 Richard 和 Katy 成为 Garnod 公司管理团队的一员，并且
Marhew 公司的员工可以看到在一家更大的公司中能提供的有吸引力的机会。
Garnod Co’s directors will also need to consider the compatibility of its culture with its
two targets. It appears that Marhew Co may be similar to Garnod Co a few years ago,
with a few dedicated individuals leading the company forward strongly. However, the
culture of Marhew Co is very informal and the company seems to lack the corporate
governance mechanisms which Garnod Co has had to develop.
Garnod 公司的董事还需要考虑其文化与其两个目标的兼容性。看起来 Marhew 公司可
能与几年前的 Garnod 公司相似，只有少数几个专注的人带领公司向前发展。然而，
Marhew 公司的文化非常不正式，该公司似乎缺乏 Garnod 公司发展必须的公司治理机
制。
(b)
Equity value of Garnod Co, using a multiple of free cash flows to equity
$60 million x 8 = $480 million
计算
explanation_zh:
题目由于提供了 Multiple of Free Cash Flows to Equity (FCFE), 所以 Value of equity =
Multiple of FCFE × FCFE，所以 Garnod 公司在收购前的价值（Ve before acquisition）
就等于 FCFE $60 million x Multiple of FCFE 8 = $480 million。
Equity value of Pilsur Co, using the PV of free cash flows to equity
ke = 3.8% + (1.4 x 8%) = 15%
g = 0.015
Valuation = $70 million× (1 + 0.015)/(0.15 – 0.015) = $526.3 million
计算解析：
题目由于提供了 Pilsur 公司的 equity beta，所以可以借助 CAPM 推算公司的 Ke。
再加上题目条件提供了 expected growth rate in Pilsur Co’s free cash flows to equity，
所以可以按照永续增长的折现求和方式推算
Ve of Pilsur before acquisition = FCFE×(1+g)/(Ke-g)
= $70 million× (1 + 0.015)/(0.15 – 0.015) = $526.3 million
Combined company additional value created
Value of combined company = 8 x 1.05 x ($60 million + $70 million + $9 million) =
$1,167.6 million
Additional value created = $1,167.6 million – ($480 million + $526.3 million) = $161.3
million
计算解析：
按照收购后的 Multiple of FCFE = 8 x 1.05 = 8.4 ，乘以合并后公司的 FCFE = Garnod
Co’s FCFE $60m + Pilsur Co’s FCFE $70m + 兼并收购产生的协同效应 $9m = $139m，
可以算出合并后 Combined 公司的 Ve = 8.4 × $139m = $1167.6m。
所以兼并收购额外产生的价值 Additional value created = 合并后 Combined 公司的 Ve
$1167.6m - Ve of Garnod Co before acquisition $480m - Ve of Pilsur Co before
acquisition $526.3 m = $161.3m
Comparison of valuations
Minimum price Pilsur Co’s shareholders would be prepared to accept = 100 million x
$5.40 x 1.14 = $615.6 million, or $6.156 per share.
Target price Garnod Co would pay if 60% of gains accrued to its shareholders = $526.3
million + ((1 – 0.6) x $161.3 million) = $590.8 million, or $5.908 per share.
If the minimum price was offered to Pilsur Co’s shareholders, the gains which would
accrue to Garnod Co’s shareholders = $526.3 million + $161.3 million – $615.6 million =
$72 million, 44.6% of the gains.
Alternative working:
If the minimum price was offered to Pilsur Co’s shareholders, the gains which would
accrue to Garnod Co’s shareholders = $1,167.6 million – $615.6 million – $480 million =
$72 million, 44.6% of the gains.
计算解析：
题目条件明确指出 Pilsur 公司的股东可以接受的最低报价是溢价 14%，也就意味着
Pilsur 公司要求的最低对价 Minimum consideration 是 100m x $5.40 x (1+14%) =
$615.6m。需要注意这里根据题目条件是按照 current price of its shares 算溢价 14%，
而不是根据上面算出的 Ve of Pilsur Co before acquisition $526.3 m。
在确保 Pilsur 公司的股东要求的最低对价的情况下，Garnod 公司股东可以通过兼并收
购 Pilsur 公司获得的 additional value = Ve of Pilsur Co before acquisition $526.3 m +
Additional value created $161.3m - Minimum consideration $615.6m = 72m
72m / Additional value created $161.3m = 44.6% < 60%
而 Garnod 公司董事如果要确保兼并收购产生的额外价值中的 60%属于 Garnod 公司的
股东，也就意味着剩下的 40% of Additional value created $161.3m 会给到 Pilsur 公司的
股东，所以预计支付给 Pilsur 公司的股东的金额是 = Ve of Pilsur Co before acquisition
$526.3 m + 40% x Additional value created $161.3m = $590.8m < Minimum
consideration $615.6m, 这就意味着无法让 Pilsur 公司的股东接受。
(c)
Friendly bidder 友好竞标者
The board of Pilsur Co fears the loss of independence and changes which acquisition by
Garnod Co may bring and, in particular, the threat to their own jobs. Under best
corporate governance practice, they must act in accordance with the best interests of
Pilsur Co’s shareholders, rather than their own interests. Attempting to find another
buyer to bid may be viewed as legitimate if the bid is higher.
Pilsur 公司的董事会担心 Garnod 公司收购可能带来的独立性的丧失和变化，特别是对
他们自身工作的威胁。根据公司治理实践典范，他们必须按照 Pilsur 公司股东的最佳
利益行事，而不是他们自己的利益。如果出价更高，试图寻找另一个买家出价可能被
视为合法。
However, Pilsur Co operates in a specialist area and is listed on the smaller company
investment market rather than the main market, perhaps making it less appealing as an
investment. It is quite possible that a friendly bidder may not be found.
然而，Pilsur 公司在一个专业领域运营，并在小型公司股票交易市场上市而不是主板上
市，这可能使其作为投资的吸引力降低。很可能找不到友好的投标人。
If Pilsur Co’s directors fail to find one, this may persuade its shareholders to accept a
lower price from Garnod Co. Also given Pilsur Co’s lack of recent growth, the acquirer
may feel it has to make significant changes to improve the business’s prospects, even if
it says when it bids that it does not plan major changes.
如果 Pilsur 公司的董事未能找到一个友好的竞标人，这可能会说服其股东接受 Garnod
公司的较低价格。此外，鉴于 Pilsur 公司最近缺乏增长，收购方可能会觉得必须做出
重大改变以改善业务前景，即使它在出价时表示不计划进行重大改变。
Counter-bid for Garnod Co 反向收购 Garnod 公司
If directors are acting in the best interests of Pilsur Co, any bid for Garnod Co should
have strategic logic to it. There are strategic reasons in favour of Pilsur Co bidding for
Garnod Co: diversification into areas of training which have shown better growth than
Pilsur Co’s current main areas and also acquiring Garnod Co’s e-learning capabilities.
The directors of Pilsur Co would remain in charge of the business. However, if Pilsur Co
has not been planning an acquisition, it is doubtful whether it has the strategic plans
necessary to make the merger work. It may also face resistance from Garnod Co’s staff
who see themselves as being taken over by a less successful company with a weaker
culture.
如果董事们的行为符合 Pilsur 公司的最佳利益，那么对 Garnod 公司的任何收购应该具
有战略逻辑。Pilsur 公司对 Garnod 公司的收购在战略层面有以下原因：多元化进入培
训领域，这些领域的增长比 Pilsur 公司目前的主要领域更好，同时还收购了 Garnod 公
司的在线学习业务的能力。Pilsur 公司的董事将继续负责该业务。然而，如果 Pilsur 公
司一直没有计划进行收购，那么它是否具有使合并成功所需的战略计划是值得怀疑
的。它还可能面临 Garnod 公司的员工抵制，他们认为自己被一家文化较弱、不太成功
的公司接管。
There is also the question of financing the bid. The fact that Pilsur Co’s profits have not
been growing quickly recently suggests that it may lack the surplus cash required to
finance the acquisition. A share-for-share offer may not appear attractive to Garnod
Co’s shareholders. If the bid is for cash, obtaining equity or debt finance may be difficult
if fund providers doubt whether the acquisition will be successful. Pilsur Co also has
some debt capital already, so there is also the issue of how feasible it would be to raise
further loan capital for any purposes and what the reaction of existing debt providers
would be.
另外，还存在为收购对价融资的问题。Pilsur 公司的利润最近没有快速增长，这表明它
可能缺乏为收购提供对价所需的盈余现金。对 Garnod 公司的股东来说，换股要约可能
没有吸引力。如果收购对价是现金，在资金提供者怀疑收购是否会成功的情况下获得
股权融资或债务融资可能会很困难。Pilsur 公司也已经有了一些负债，因此还有一个问
题是，为任何目的筹集更多贷款的可行性如何，以及现有债务提供者的反应如何。
source_doc: ACCA:afm:case:更新-AFM 2024 M&J 真题解析.pdf#3

stem_zh:
要求对计算结果进行评估和讨论假设，需要结合题目场景进行讨论和评估，尤其对于假设的
部分也同样需要结合题目场景来判断该假设是否合理，否则就拿不到高分。有部分学员甚至
在讨论过程中给出的数据没有相关计算过程，这样就很难找到支撑观点的来源。
source_doc: ACCA:afm:case:ACCA Max AFM常见问题与备考建议.pdf

stem_zh:
要求。Due diligence of logistic networks used to transport the food may be easier to
undertake because of common compliance requirements.
4. 而且建立 EU 内的分公司，也相对容易找到资本和人力。Having access to capital
and labour within the EU may make it easier for the company to set up branches
inside the EU, if it wants to .
5. 欧盟或许还有一些补贴政策，对于 EU 内建立的公司。The company may also be
able to access any trants which are available to companies based within the EU.
(题目：2014-12-Q1，2014-12-Q3）
WTO 世界贸易组织【背】
为了支持国际贸易的发展，世贸组织提供了一个确定和减少贸易壁垒和解决贸易
争端的机制。如果成员违反了规则，世界贸易组织将处以罚款。To support the
development of international trade, the WTO provides a mechanism for identifying
and reducing trade barriers and resolving trade disputes. WTO will impose fines,if
members are in reach of their rules.
WIO 的建立是为了降低国际贸易壁垒，它这样做是为了防止保护主义的措施，如
关税，配额和其他进口限制。它也作为一个谈判论坛，解决国家之间的争端。世
贸组织鼓励自由贸易，通过将最惠国原则应用于其成员国之间，在一个国家提供
给另一个国家的关税降低的政策惠及所有成员国。The World Trade Organization
(WTO）was set up to continue to implement the General Agreement on Tariffs and
Trade(GATT), and its main aims are to reduce the barriers to international trade. It
does this by seeking to prevent protectionist measure such as tariffs ,quotas and
other import restrictions. It also acts as a form for negotiation and offering
settlement processes to resolve disputes between countries. The WTO encourages
free trade by applying the most favoured nation principle between its
members,where reduction in tariffs offered to one country by another should be
offered to all members.
虽然世贸组织已经取得了显著的成功，阻止了一些国家之间的贸易保护主义措施，
但也允许另一些保护主义措施，特别是非基于非关税为基础的，这部分是很难确
定和控制。Whereas the WTO has had notable success, some protectionist measures
between groups of countries are nevertheless allowed and some protectionist
measures, especially non-tariff based ones, have been harder to identify and control.
优点：
1. 入世降低了贸易保护措施
2. 通常情况下，当各国实施贸易保护主义措施时，相互对对方进行报复。入世
可以减少这些可能，让公司专注于增加贸易和经济增长。
3. 这样的政策也可能让公司专注在某些产品和服务上，以获得竞争优势，并更
有效地竞争在全球范围内，获得全球政治资本和全球影响力。
缺点：
1. 可能的缺点主要是围绕需要保护某些行业。
1）比如有些行业的发展是需要时间的，稍加时日他们就会具有全球竞争力，过
早的介入保护会损害他们明日的发展。
2）另外，对于一些老旧的衰退行业，一旦放开竞争就会迅速倒闭，可能早就大
量失业，这在社会和政治层面看是不可接受的。
2. 某些保护主义政策的目的是为了防止商品“倾销”，即以一个非常便宜的价格
售卖，这损害了当地生产者。
（题目：2013-12-Q1）
IMF 国际货币基金组织【背】
To support stability of the international monetary system by providing support to
countries withbalance of payment problem. 为国际收支不平衡的国家提供帮助，
确保国际货币体系的稳定性。
When a member is having difficulties overcoming balance of payments problem, the
IMF will offer advice on economic policy and lend money at subsidized rates. 当一个
成员在克服国际收支平衡问题时有困难，IMF 将提供经济政策的建议和补贴率贷
款。
（题目：2012-12-Q5）
Central Banks 央行【背】
Normally have control over interest rates and support the stability of the financial
system. Collaboration between central banks is supported by the bank of
international settlements. 银行的银行，通常对利率有控制权，支持金融体系的稳
定性。中央银行之间的合作是由国际清算银行来支持的。
World band 世界银行【背】
世 界 银 行 是 提 供 贷 款 的 机 构 partially funded by the IMF, exists to fund
reconstruction and redevelopment and to eliminate poverty, loans are normally
made directly to governments,for period of 10-20 years and tied to specific projects.
部分由国际货币基金组织资助，它的存在是为了筹借资金用于重建和重新发展，
以消除贫困。贷款通常是直接给政府为期 10-20 年，绑定到特定的项目上。
Euro Bonds 欧债【背】
Euro bonds are long-term loans raised by international companies or other
institutions and sold to investors in several countries at the same time. Euro bonds
are normally repaid after 5-15years, and are for major amounts of capital i.e $10m or
more.欧元债券是由于国际公司或其他机构发起的长期贷款，可以同时在多个国
家出售给投资者。欧债通常在 5-15 年内偿还，资本金额巨大（比如 1000 万美金
或更多）。
优点：
1. Interest is paid gross and this has meant that Euro bonds have been used by
investors to avoid tax. 利息是按照总收入给付（未扣除税金），这意味着欧债可以
被用来避税。
2. Euro bonds create a liability in a foreign currency to match against a foreign
currency asset.欧债可以创造一个外币负责，与外币的资产相匹配。
3. They are often cheaper than a foreign currency bank loan because they can be
sold on by the investor, who will therefore accept a lower yield in return for this
greater liquidity. 他们往往比一个外币银行贷款便宜，因为他们可以由投资者出
售，投资者接受一个较低的收益率，以换取更大的流动性。
4. They are also extremely flexible. Most euro bonds are fixed rate but they can be
floating rate or linked to the financial success of the company.他们非常灵活。大多数
欧债有固定利率，但也可浮动，与公司的财务成功挂钩。
5. They are typically issued by companies with excellent credit ratings and are
normally unsecured,which makes it easier for companies to raise debt finance in the
future. 他们通常是由优秀的信用评级公司发行，通常是无担保的。这使得企业
更容易在未来获得债务融资。
6. Euro bond issues are not normally advertised because they are placed with
institutional investors and this reduces issue costs. 欧债的发行通常不做广告，因为
他们发行给机构投资者，这也降低了发行成本。
缺点：
1. Like any form of debt finance there will be issue costs to consider ( approximately
2% of funds raised in the case of Euro bonds) and there may also be problems if
gearing levels are too high. 像大多数债务融资一样，必须考虑发行成本（大约是
债务规模的 2%），如果公司本身的杠杆率抬高，也会有其他问题。
2. A borrower contemplating a euro bond issue must consider the foreign exchange
risk of a long-term foreign currency loan. If the money is to be used to purchase
assets which will earn revenue in a currency of the loan strengthens against the
currency of the revenues out of which the bond(and interest) must be repaid.借款人
考虑欧债发行问题时，必须考虑一个长期外汇风险。如果这笔钱用于购买资产，
它将以不同于债券发行的货币形式来获得收入。借款人将承担外汇损失的风险，
如果贷款的货币强于收入的货币，而欧债利息是按照贷款货币来偿付的。
